title: Okinawa
writer: Arthur A. Ross, Leonard Stern, Jameson Brewer
actors: Pat O'Brien, Cameron Mitchell, Richard Denning
plot: Captain Hale takes over command of a U. S. Naval vessel as it prepares to take part in the invasion of Okinawa in the Second World War. His crew includes a rowdy gun crew who punctuate fire missions with banter and antics.
